user.title: Connect to Smart Meter Gateway
user.description: Enter your SMGW HAN interface credentials. The integration will fetch certified daily meter readings once per day.

data_description.url: URL of the SMGW HAN interface (default: https://192.168.100.100/cgi-bin/hanservice.cgi)
data_description.tariff_switch_hour: Hour when the standard tariff begins
data_description.tariff_switch_minute: Minute of the tariff switch (0, 15, 30 or 45)
data_description.update_time: Time of day for the automatic daily data fetch
data_description.device_name: Leave empty unless you set this integration up multiple times against the same SMGW (e.g. separate logins for grid import and feed-in). In that case enter a distinct name to tell the devices apart.

select_meter.title: Select meter
select_meter.description: Your SMGW exposes multiple meters. Pick which physical meter this entry shall represent in Home Assistant. If you want to monitor both, just add another entry after this setup and pick the other meter there.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SMGW
reauth_confirm.description: The SMGW credentials are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SMGW. Check the URL and network connection.
error.parse_error: Could not parse the SMGW response. Please double-check the username and password. If the credentials are correct, wait up to 15 minutes and try again.

init.title: SMGW Settings
init.description: Update credentials, tariff time and fetch time.

data_description.url: URL of the SMGW HAN interface (default: https://192.168.100.100/cgi-bin/hanservice.cgi)
data_description.tariff_switch_hour: Hour when the standard tariff begins
data_description.tariff_switch_minute: Minute of the tariff switch (0, 15, 30 or 45)
data_description.update_time: Time of day for the automatic daily data fetch
data_description.device_name: Custom name (e.g. "SMGW Import" / "SMGW Export") for the case where you run multiple logins against the same SMGW as separate entries. Otherwise leave empty.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SMGW. Check the URL and network connection.
error.configured_meter_missing: The previously configured meter is no longer present in the SMGW dropdown, but several other meters are listed. Please remove this entry in Home Assistant and add it again to pick from the available meters.
error.parse_error: Could not parse the SMGW response. Please double-check the username and password. If the credentials are correct, wait up to 15 minutes and try again.
